characters.appearance: Small, bright green cartoon owl. It has large, expressive eyes, a small yellow beak, and small wings.
Adult male with a medium build and brown complexion. He has a thick black beard and mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Bright blue turban, pink sweater with a purple pattern, and blue pants.
characters.demeanor: Neutral to slightly expressive, acting as a patient guide.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the app interface and user goal right away.
- Replaces generic language selection with practical, goal-oriented English learning modules.
- Sets a focused, career-oriented tone for the user journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova पर क्या सीखना चाहते हैं? [What do you want to learn on Supernova?]
Spoken English
Interview Practice
Daily Conversation
Office English
CONTINUE

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: मुझे अपनी communication skills improve करनी हैं। [I want to improve my communication skills.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces a listening exercise using a highly relatable, real-world goal (improving communication).
- Shows the app's error correction mechanism.
- Mascot provides warm, older-sibling style encouragement when the user makes a mistake.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सुनकर सही words चुनो [Listen and choose the right words]
I want to improve my communication skills
CONTINUE
Incorrect
Correct Answer:
I want to improve my communication skills.
GOT IT
कोई बात नहीं, फिर try करो! [No worries, try again!]

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Yes, I am ready for the interview. [Yes, I am ready for the interview.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the AI voice recognition and speaking practice feature.
- Uses a practical, career-focused sentence to resonate with working professionals.
- Provides immediate positive reinforcement upon success.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अब बोल कर practice करो [Now practice by speaking]
Yes, I am ready for the interview.
TAP TO SPEAK
CONTINUE
बहुत बढ़िया! [Very good!]

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Could you please explain this project to me? [Could you please explain this project to me?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights a grammar/listening exercise in an office context.
- Reinforces the app's utility for tier-2/tier-3 users navigating corporate environments.
- Shows clear, constructive feedback on incorrect answers.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
खाली जगह भरो [Fill in the blank]
Could you please ____ this project to me?
explained
explain
Incorrect
Correct Answer:
Could you please explain this project to me?
GOT IT

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final brand message and call to action.
- Removes competitor's 'free' and 'world's #1' hype, replacing it with an empowering, confidence-based hook.
- Directs the user to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
आज ही confidently English बोलना सीखें [Learn to speak English confidently today]
Supernova
Download the app and start your journey.
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
